name: Step2 Rain Showers Splash Pond Water Table, Kids Water and Sand Activity Sensory Playset, Summer Outdoor Toys, 13 Piece Water Toy Accessories, For Toddlers 1.5+ Years Old, Blue & Green
bullets: This kids’ water table will create a mini water park right in your backyard! Use the large bucket to scoop up water from the pond and pour into the top waterfall tray. Watch as the rainfall effect is activated as the water splashes into the pond!

As the waterfall drains back into the water table pond, maze-like spinners, ramps and buckets are activated! Rearrange the put-and-place maze pieces to create new waterfalls for fun cause and effect STEM play
Kids can make a spinning splash in the “rain” with the hand-held spinning wheel and use the side flipper to flip figures back into the pond!
Easy to clean! Use disinfectant wipes or household cleaners whenever you want!
description: Create A Mini Water Park Right In Your Back Yard With The Rain Showers Splash Pond Water Table By Step2. The Two-Tier Design Creates A Showering Splash Below! Just Scoop Up Water From The Pond And Pour Into The Top Tray To Make It Rain. Watch As The Rainfall Activates The Maze-Like Spinners And Ramps, A Great Way To Show A Cause And Effect Relationship. From The Side Flipper To The Put-And-Place Maze Pieces, Kids Will Have Lots Of Splish-Splash Fun With The Included Water Table Accessories!

reviews.name: Elif O.
reviews.title: Hours of entertainment for the little ones! Absolute hit.
reviews.body: This water table is incredible and has kept my toddler entertained for hours! The "rain shower" effect from the top tier is super fun, and it comes with so many great accessories and toys that keep things interesting. It was relatively easy to assemble, very sturdy, and the perfect height. It’s been fantastic for hot sunny days in the backyard. Definitely worth every penny for summer fun!

reviews.name: Trudy Boylan
reviews.title: Sturdy and perfect size for my 2.5 year old toddler
reviews.body: It is easy to set up. Perfect for my toddler. Sturdy and lots of fun toys came with it. The plastic is durable and the color is good. A great value. She loves it!

reviews.name: LS
reviews.title: Great for 1 year old
reviews.body: Worth every penny. Took me an hour to put together, but seems sturdy and durable. I like that it's fun both dry and wet. My 13 month old loves it, perfect for his height.

reviews.name: Melissak
reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.body: This is our second Step2 Water Table because we loved the first one so much! Our original has been in constant use for over five years and is still going strong at grandkids house. It's been a favorite for hours of outdoor fun, and the quality has really held up over time. We were happy to buy another one because it's durable, easy to put together, and keeps little ones entertained for hours.…
